implemented_now: protocol replay summary emits runtime_contract_hash derived from runtime contract snapshot versions/hashes and runtime_policy_versions
protocol replay resolves and enforces a single compatible ledger_schema_version and fails closed on incompatible/mixed schema versions
protocol replay comparison surfaces ledger_schema_version, runtime_contract_hash, runtime_policy_versions, and compatibility_validation drift as deterministic differences
dispatcher replay isolation now enforces recorded operation results only and fails closed with E_REPLAY_OPERATION_MISSING when an operation record is absent

replay compatibility evaluation now emits compatibility_validation and supports strict fail-closed gates for runtime contract mismatch, required artifact metadata missing, and incomplete lifecycle events
replay comparison now emits drift_report with drift_schema_version 1.0 and deterministic layer precedence (runtime_contract -> tool_schema -> prompt -> tool_behavior -> artifact_formatting)
determinism campaign output now includes primary_drift_layer and per-run drift_report from replay comparison output

new contract/integration/unit tests prove replay-mode operation isolation, strict compatibility mismatch rejection, strict completeness rejection, replay error-code registration/description, and drift classifier priority ordering
pending_for_slice_completion: strict replay compatibility checks for capability profile snapshot and workspace state snapshot surfaces
explicit replay isolation guardrails for network/external side effects and non-reconstruction filesystem writes
